title: Bottom Panel Logs
description: Studio UI for **Bottom Panel Logs**: recent specd log lines from in-memory readback (`GET /v1/logs` → `kernel.logs.read`). This channel is separate from studio output and MUST NOT mix validation or action result lines here. In the shell bottom strip it is the **third** tab (rightmost in v1 web layout).
context: Studio UI for **Bottom Panel Logs**: recent specd log lines from in-memory readback (`GET /v1/logs` → `kernel.logs.read`). This channel is separate from studio output and MUST NOT mix validation or action result lines here. In the shell bottom strip it is the **third** tab (rightmost in v1 web layout).

rules.requirement: Logs is the trailing bottom tab
rules: The shell MUST render **Logs** as the rightmost of the three web bottom tabs (Output, Problems, Logs).
The panel MUST call `readProjectLogs({ limit: 500, prettier: true })` on the global poll tick and render `lines` or formatted entries.

Structural validation messages and save confirmations MUST NOT be written only to Logs; they belong on the studio output stream. Debug traces MUST use action ids in the log message; the same user-facing string MUST NOT appear as both an output line and an identical log line.
When no log lines exist, the panel MUST show: *Recent specd log entries appear here.*
Components MUST consume data through `SpecdDataPort` hooks and MUST NOT import `@specd/core`.

rules.requirement: view surfaces loading and error states
rules: While requests are in flight or fail, the UI MUST show loading indicators and human-readable errors.

scenarios.requirement: Logs is the trailing bottom tab
scenarios.name: Logs is rightmost web bottom tab
when: user views the bottom tab strip
then: Logs is the third tab after Output and Problems

scenarios.name: Logs panel shows ring entries
then: formatted log lines include the posted message

scenarios.name: Trace log uses action id not output body
given: shell appended output with message Saved proposal.md
then: log message is save-artifact (or equivalent action id)
AND log line text is not identical to Saved proposal.md

scenarios.name: Save confirmation is not logs-only
then: AND Logs may contain a debug trace but not as the sole user-facing message

scenarios.name: Empty logs shows specd log placeholder

scenarios.requirement: view surfaces loading and error states
scenarios.name: Failed log fetch shows error
